overall.description: A high-quality game engine scene from Hogwarts Legacy depicting students in wizard robes practicing spellcasting in a sunlit Gothic classroom with vaulted wooden ceilings. The stationary third-person camera captures the warm morning light streaming through arched windows as students cast spells with wands and move between wooden desks.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic magic classroom with practice dummies and wooden study desks

events.description: students begin casting spells with wands toward training dummies, producing visible magical effects
student in dark robes walks from left to right across the classroom floor

agents.ego_description: standing among classmates and practicing wand movements while observing others spellcasting

notable_agents.action: student with blonde hair actively casting spells with wand raised toward the center of the room
student in dark robes walking across the room while holding wand at the ready

entered.detail: high arched ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams and rafters
tall stone-framed windows allowing warm morning sunlight to stream into the room
dark stone walls with Gothic architectural details and mounted torches
long wooden tables and benches arranged in rows for student practice
practice target dummy positioned on a table for spellcasting exercises
ornate hanging iron chandelier with multiple candle fixtures
stone spiral staircase leading to an upper level in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a grand Gothic classroom with warm sunlight streaming through tall arched windows. Students in wizard robes stand among wooden desks, practicing spellcasting with wands aimed at training dummies. The camera remains stationary, capturing the moderate crowd density as students move about the wooden floor, with one student in the right foreground actively casting spells while another walks across the room from left to right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady view of a grand Gothic classroom bathed in the warm, consistent glow of morning sunlight. It begins with a wide perspective of the vaulted space, where students in wizard robes are scattered among heavy wooden desks. As the scene unfolds, the camera observes the fluid movement of the crowd, focusing on a student in the right foreground actively casting spells toward training dummies. The view remains fixed as another student traverses the wooden floor from left to right, maintaining the serene yet industrious atmosphere of the magical practice session.
